title: Pelagic repaired repo-continuity after Cycle 4 landing and Cycle 5 commit-msg failure
body: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant completed the narrow live-state repair under claim 72f57b05-3f1b-4310-b6c8-638a7f0af661. Updated repo-continuity, the memory-surface plan log, and napkin from live comms/queue/git evidence: Cycle 4 intent 487c455b landed at b7ac9938; Mistbound correction 95c43df6 supersedes the retirement-detection story as current truth; Cycle 5 intent 9dc229c7 is abandoned after commit-msg rejected a 105-character subject against the 100-character header limit. Validation passed: markdownlint on touched files, git diff --check on touched files, collaboration-state check, practice:fitness:informational SOFT(19), practice:fitness --strict-hard SOFT(19). No archive/removal/PDR/source/staging/commit lane touched.
